content: We can reframe intrinsic curiosity bonuses (the core mechanism of ICM and RND) as an active learning memory agent that continuously prunes, re-prioritizes, and retrieves under-explored memory fragments to drive exploration, rather than treating intrinsic reward as a separate signal appended to the agent's main reinforcement learning objective. This turns the problem of comparing intrinsic curiosity methods into the problem of benchmarking how well a memory active learning agent retains and surfaces high-value unknowns over long task horizons.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
